title: Man has made what Nature could not Best Eva figureever
display_title: Man has made what Nature could not Best Eva figureever
wikitext:
[]: Man has made what Nature could not: Best Eva figure...ever?             Quote Post by V » Sun Jun 22, 2008 8:37 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/astro-toy-with-rob-bricken-soul-of-chogokin-eva-00-prototype/2008-06-22 On the one hand, this is probably the best Evangelion action figure EVER forged. On the other hand, its $80, and I'm not forking over that much for a figure. But you get what you pay for.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jun 22, 2008 8:40 pm looks amazing. hopefully merchandise will be around for purchase in say.. 10 years when i have a lot more money than i do now.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sun Jun 22, 2008 9:14 pm I think Reichu would like the fact that the figure comes sans armor before putting it on. EDIT: Is there a Sho version?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Jun 22, 2008 10:27 pm ok here's a weird thing; does it have a jaw? I mean....Eva-01 and Eva-02 obviously have tooth-filled organic mouths; but when they show sketch art in Groundwork of Eva of "what an unarmored Eva looks like" they kind of forget to draw on mouths.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jun 23, 2008 3:21 am V wrote: ok here's a weird thing; does it have a jaw? I mean....Eva-01 and Eva-02 obviously have tooth-filled organic mouths; but when they show sketch art in Groundwork of Eva of "what an unarmored Eva looks like" they kind of forget to draw on mouths.

[]: Re: Man has made what Nature could not: Best Eva figure...e             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Mon Jun 23, 2008 8:46 am V wrote: [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/astro-toy-with-rob-bricken-soul-of-chogokin-eva-00-prototype/2008-06-22[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Jun 23, 2008 9:43 am Sachi_13 wrote: V wrote: ok here's a weird thing; does it have a jaw? I mean....Eva-01 and Eva-02 obviously have tooth-filled organic mouths; but when they show sketch art in Groundwork of Eva of "what an unarmored Eva looks like" they kind of forget to draw on mouths.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Mon Jun 23, 2008 10:12 am V wrote: I'm not asking about Eva-00 I'm asking about EVa-01. Concept art in Groundwork didn't bother to draw the naked Eva with a jaw.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Jun 23, 2008 12:45 pm I would not mind buying one of those!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 23, 2008 1:03 pm I thought the Nigouki version was actually released first?? But from what I read, there are Sho, Ni and Zero versions that will be released/are released already. And the prime symbol being used for the pimped out Soul of Chogokin figures: The reviewer must not have watched the DC episodes or EoE to get the reference though...or maybe they just weren't paying attention. That looks awesome though; it's like a hybrid of the Revoltech figures with the Soul of Chogokin ones. I might try to get the 3 Evas at some point, seeing as I don't have any of the actual Eva figures merchandise-wise.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Mon Jun 23, 2008 1:44 pm OMG WIN

[]:             Quote Post by Incisivis » Tue Jun 24, 2008 9:10 pm Beautiful. I'd buy the EVA-01 if I had the money.
